item.title: Burt Bacharach

item.title: The Ronettes
item.description: Era1961–1967GenresGirl groupBrill BuildingPop soulRhythm & bluesListenRYM·Apple Music·Spotify The Ronettes are the girl group at its most potent, the act that proved what happened when Brill Building craft and Phil Spector’s Wall of Sound met a voice strong enough to ride them both.
